ddls:
CREATE TABLE "centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each center */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region the center belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the center */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the center is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the center is located */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the center */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the center is located */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the center */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the center */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the center */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the center */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the center */,
  "center_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of center */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date when the center was founded */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of people the center can accommodate */,
  "email" TEXT /* Dedicated email for the center */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the center's social media profiles */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the center */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the center's information was last updated */,
  "active_members" INTEGER /* Number of active members in the center */,
  "is_headquarters" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the center is a headquarters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_centers_center_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_type_id") REFERENCES center_types ("center_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_centers_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the region */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person for the region */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "center_types" (
  "center_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each center type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the center type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the center type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the center type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the center hosting the event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Specific location within the center or external venue */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the person or group organizing the event */,
  "registration_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if registration is required */,
  "registration_link" TEXT /* Link to the registration page */,
  "cancellation_policy" TEXT /* Details of the cancellation policy */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the event is featured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the center where the resource is located */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "last_inventory_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inventory check */,
  "responsible_person" TEXT /* Name of the person responsible for the resource */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the resource is currently available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the center the member is associated with */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Full name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member (e.g., participant, volunteer, coordinator) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date when the member joined the center */,
  "last_attended_event" TEXT /* Date of the last event the member attended */,
  "last_resource_used" TEXT /* Date of the last resource the member used */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the member is active */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Member's preferred method of contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member attending the event */,
  "attendance_date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "attendance_status" TEXT /* Status of the attendance (e.g., confirmed, tentative, did not attend) */,
  "feedback_provided" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the member provided feedback for the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_attendance_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member using the resource */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of usage */,
  "quantity_used" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource used */,
  "condition_after_use" TEXT /* Condition of the resource after use */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_usage_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the center the announcement is for */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the announcement */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the announcement */,
  "announcement_date" TEXT /* Date the announcement was made */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the announcement is no longer valid */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "newsletters" (
  "newsletter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each newsletter */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the center the newsletter is for */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the newsletter */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the newsletter */,
  "send_date" TEXT /* Date the newsletter was sent */,
  "open_rate" REAL /* Percentage of recipients who opened the newsletter */,
  "click_rate" REAL /* Percentage of recipients who clicked on links in the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("newsletter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_newsletters_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member who subscribed */,
  "subscription_type" TEXT /* Type of subscription (e.g., newsletter, announcements) */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date the member subscribed */,
  "unsubscription_date" TEXT /* Date the member unsubscribed */,
  "unsubscription_reason" TEXT /* Reason the member unsubscribed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_subscriptions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member providing feedback */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., event, resource) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the member */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the member */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was provided */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the event if the feedback is for an event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the resource if the feedback is for a resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "donations" (
  "donation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donation */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member making the donation */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the center receiving the donation */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the donation */,
  "donation_date" TEXT /* Date the donation was made */,
  "donation_type" TEXT /* Type of donation (e.g., monetary, in-kind) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_donations_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volunteer_hours" (
  "volunteer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volunteer hours entry */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the member who volunteered */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the center where the member volunteered */,
  "hours" REAL /* Number of hours volunteered */,
  "volunteer_date" TEXT /* Date the volunteer hours were logged */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of volunteer activity */,
  "supervisor" TEXT /* Name of the supervisor for the volunteer activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("volunteer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteer_hours_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_volunteer_hours_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)
